'''valono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zac|zac]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zac|zac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| valono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væleneth|væleneth]] || [[word:vælenej|vælenej]] || [[word:vælenesh|vælenesh]] || [[word:vælene|vælene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:valolonoth|valolonoth]] || [[word:valolonoj|valolonoj]] || [[word:valolonosh|valolonosh]] || [[word:valolono|valolono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:valonoth|valonoth]] || [[word:valonoj|valonoj]] || [[word:valonosh|valonosh]] || [[word:valono|valono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:valofnoth|valofnoth]] || [[word:valofnoj|valofnoj]] || [[word:valofnosh|valofnosh]] || [[word:valofnof|valofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:valonotho|valonotho]] || [[word:valonojo|valonojo]] || [[word:valonosho|valonosho]] || [[word:valonoko|valonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:valonoth|valonoth]] || [[word:valonoj|valonoj]] || [[word:valonosh|valonosh]] || [[word:valono|valono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:valonothol|valonothol]] || [[word:valonojol|valonojol]] || [[word:valonoshol|valonoshol]] || [[word:valonokol|valonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:valonothotho|valonothotho]] || [[word:valonojojo|valonojojo]] || [[word:valonoshosho|valonoshosho]] || [[word:valonoko|valonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:valonothon|valonothon]] || [[word:valonojon|valonojon]] || [[word:valonoshon|valonoshon]] || [[word:valonokon|valonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:valonothoro|valonothoro]] || [[word:valonojoro|valonojoro]] || [[word:valonoshoro|valonoshoro]] || [[word:valonokoro|valonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
